title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
summary: Data centers are expected to use one-fifth of the electricity generated in the U.S. by 2035, four times that of today, according to a new report from BloombergNEF . The revisions reflect the fevered pace of data center development across the U.S.
